hero.headline: Preserving memories
hero.subheadline: Design personal memorial and mourning cards — simple, dignified, and in just a few minutes. Choose from over 20 background images and design your card directly online.
hero.howItWorksSubtitle: Create your personal memorial card in just three steps — no design skills needed.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Dignified memorial print — your trusted partner for years

story.title: Our Story
story.p1: Trauerpost specializes in dignified memorial print products. We design memorial cards, mourning cards, and thank-you cards — individually and with the greatest care.
story.p2: Together with you, we quickly create an appropriate design that honors the memory of your loved ones. We can also incorporate personal photographs from bereaved families.
story.p3: All elements for dignified memorial print — from design to the finished product — available from us in one place.

personal.title: Personal Guidance
personal.description: We support you compassionately through the design process — by phone, email, or online.

quality.title: Premium Quality
quality.description: Professional printing on high-quality paper — dignified and long-lasting.

fast.title: Fast Delivery
fast.description: We know time matters. Your cards are printed and delivered as quickly as possible.

custom.title: Custom Design
custom.description: Every card is designed to your wishes — with your own photos, text, and motifs.
